headline: South L.A. Residents Gain 37 New Affordable Homes as Eleos and Health Net Break Ground at 5637 S. Broadway
summary: More South Los Angeles residents will soon have a stable place to call home. Today, Eleos and Health Net marked the start of construction on a new 37-unit affordable housing community at 5637 S. Broadway in South Los Angeles.
